name: Cheese and Pasta Pie
recipeInstructions:
Combine the pasta, oil and 2 eggs. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a 10-inch quiche or pie pan. Cover the edge of the pasta with greased foil to prevent burning. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 7 to 10 minutes, or until set.
Cook the frozen spinach according to package directions. Drain well. Add the sliced onion, parsley and basil. Beat together the ricotta, remaining eggs and milk, add 1/2 cup mozzarella and stir in the vegetable mixture, Worcestershire sauce, seasonings and Parmesan cheese. Spoon into the pasta shell.
Sprinkle the remaining mozzarella on top. Bake at 375 degrees for about 30 minutes, or until set. Allow to stand 10 minutes before serving.
